calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jun-18-2024 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: No appearance. Notice having been given and there being no appearance or objection filed, the Court orders the case dismissed pursuant to Government Code Section 68608(b). The court finds no good cause or substantial justification for failure to comply with the previous court orders. A less severe sanction would not be effective due to the history of lack of compliance. Judge: Anne-Christine Massullo; Clerk: G. Gonzales; Proceedings not reported. (610)

Judge: Anne-Christine Massullo; Clerk: M. Macadangdang; Proceedings not reported. (610)

MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD
Off Calendar Jun-30-2023 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

RE: Plaintiff's counsel Tess Mullin and Bond Legal PC's motion to be relieved as counsel.

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

The court adopts its tentative ruling. Plaintiff's counsel Tess Mullin and Bond Legal PC's motion to be relieved as counsel, which is unopposed, is GRANTED.

Counsel is to submit a proposed order on the mandatory Judicial Council form.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn, Clerk: R. Woods, Not Reported. (302/RBU)
